changes: The MP cost of the actions Ruin and Ruin II has been reduced.

new_content.name: Manderville Gold Saucer
new_content.description: An exciting new attraction offering mini-games, chocobo racing, Triple Triad, and other group events.

new_content.name: Rise and Shine
new_content.description: Side story quest for the Zodiac Weapons.

new_content.name: The Vital Title
new_content.description: Side story quest for the Zodiac Weapons.

new_content.name: A Qiqirn Always Pays His Debts
new_content.description: Delivery Moogle side quest.

new_content.name: The Hazy Professor
new_content.description: Delivery Moogle side quest.

new_content.name: It Could Happen to You
new_content.description: Unlocks the Manderville Gold Saucer.

new_content.name: World of Wonders
new_content.description: Manderville Gold Saucer side quest.

new_content.name: So You Want to Be a Jockey
new_content.description: Manderville Gold Saucer side quest for Chocobo Racing.
new_content.location: The Gold Saucer, Chocobo Square (X:6 Y:4)

new_content.name: Triple Triad Trial
new_content.description: Manderville Gold Saucer side quest for Triple Triad.

new_content.name: Scratch it Rich
new_content.description: Manderville Gold Saucer side quest for Mini Cactpot.

new_content.name: Hitting the Cactpot
new_content.description: Manderville Gold Saucer side quest for Jumbo Cactpot.

new_content.name: So You Think You Can Ride This Chocobo
new_content.description: Manderville Gold Saucer side quest regarding Chocobo Racing training.

new_content.name: Like Sire Like Fledgling
new_content.description: Manderville Gold Saucer side quest regarding chocobo covering.
new_content.location: The Gold Saucer, Chocobo Square (X:6 Y:4)

new_content.name: Chocobo Racing
new_content.description: A competitive racing system involving trained racing chocobos, breeding, and custom controls.

new_content.name: Triple Triad
new_content.description: A collectible card game played against NPCs and other players.

new_content.name: Jumbo Cactpot
new_content.description: A weekly lottery system.

new_content.name: Mini Cactpot
new_content.description: A daily lottery system.

new_content.name: GATE (Gold Saucer Active Time Events)
new_content.description: Audience-participatory events staged within the Gold Saucer. Includes Cliffhanger, Vase Off, Skinchange We Can Believe In, The Time of My Life, and Any Way the Wind Blows.

new_content.name: Minigames
new_content.description: Simple entertainment games including Monster Toss, Crystal Tower Striker, The Moogle's Paw, and Cuff-a-Cur.

new_content.name: Zodiac Weapon Zeta Upgrade System
new_content.description: A system to upgrade Zodiac Weapons to item level 135 using mahatma, soul resonance, and materia infusion.

housing.name: Green Tea Set
housing.description: Far more bitter than its black counterpart, green tea is by far the beverage of choice in far-eastern Doma. To offset the sharpness of its flavor, it is oft accompanied by something sweet, such as sticky rice cakes.
